bodyText: The future of aviation is coming soon.
all-electric air taxi, soon to be
bookable at the tap of a button.
Our app coordinates your end-to-end commute,
including an Uber to and from our vertiport.
Joby Completes Piloted Electric Air Taxi
Flight Across San Francisco Bay and
